title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI & library for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux, or inside Docker.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; chat, generate, embeddings, vision.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting with local models; OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama exposing sync/async APIs, streaming, and Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API with tokio.

title: ollama-ai/npm
summary: Community TypeScript client published on npm with Promise & stream helpers for Node and browsers.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat sidebar.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal Next.js chatbot template demonstrating streaming responses from a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image (ollama/ollama) with CUDA, ROCm, and CPU variants for x86 & ARM.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that wraps Ollama models as Generators and Embedders for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama for generation and sentence-transformers for retrieval.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama completions into channels via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with local Ollama models in threads with rate-limiting.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper leveraging Finch & Jason for streaming chat/generate calls to Ollama.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client built with Bubble Tea (Go) supporting markdown and conversation history.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Official registry of Modelfile definitions for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeGemma, etc.

title: ollama-reddit-discussion
summary: Reddit thread announcing Ollama v0.11 featuring vision model support and multi-modal chat.
